title: [MTR] TGV PSE + TGV Postal
description: TGV Sud-Est & TGV Postal addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the TGV Sud-Est to the game.

Three liveries are provided:
- A modern "Carmillon" livery
- A silver-blue livery from the 90s
- The original orange livery from 1981

Each car for each livery has at least two versions : An "F" version (forwards) and a "B" version (backwards), determining which way the car will be pointed.

There are five types of cars in the pack:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Power cars (two pantograph heights are provided : 5 blocks and 6 blocks. Please use the one most adapted to your network)
2. End cars (passenger cars that are meant to go after the power car, and have a special cone on the top. Two per train) (1st and 2nd class)
3. Standard cars (1st and 2nd class)
4. Bar cars (one per train)
5. Bogies : The standalone bogie will show up as a separate car in the list. You must add it to your train between each cars, except for the power cars.

</details>



Example layout of the train :
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```
POWER CAR (F)
END CAR (F) (1st class)
CAR (F) (2nd class)
CAR (F) (1st class)
CAR (F) (1st class)
BAR CAR
CAR (B) (1st class)
CAR (B) (2nd class)
END CAR (B) (2nd class)
POWER CAR (B)
```

</details>

Make sure to check the license if you're interested in making other liveries. Additionally, you are allowed to use this ressource pack in servers, let's plays and other creations providing that you give credit.

**[Check out my other TGV packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

Check out the [France addon project](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-france-addon)!
## Enjoy it!

![TGV PSE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab48d4435528cf6eae2aa3c6322dc5fa7e362628.jpeg)
